title: Executed provisioning + per-stack Directus lifecycle. Turns M21's print-only recipe into an EXECUTED bring-up step: a per-stack Directus boots as a COMPOSE SERVICE in the stack's override (offset port 8055+N*10000, joins app-network, named <project>-directus-1, torn down with the stack), provisioned idempotently (bootstrap -> apply-structure -> replay -> boot), verified (a SERVICES row + /server/health + a 'registered collections > 0' cheap-win + a no-prod-read env assert) — demo default-on / dev opt-in (--local-content). The EnvContract.Validate firewall becomes a LOAD-BEARING EXECUTED GATE (hard-abort before any write if the env resolves to prod). Non-fatal: a failed boot degrades to the prod-read path with an honest status line.
position_note: M22 is the 2nd milestone of v1.5 'prop room' (M21->M25). M21 made the directus replay exit 0 + serve anonymously; M22 boots + verifies the per-stack instance as a compose service; M23 points services at it (re-point DIRECTUS_BASE_ADDR) + closes referential gaps; M24 tells the corpus-wide truth + the hygiene strand; M25 proves it live. Strictly sequential. After this close: M23 (/developer-kit:build-milestone, section shape — content cutover + referential closure).
kind: a section milestone — production code in the SEPARATE gitignored rosetta-extensions authoring copy (shell engines: dev-stack/dev-setdress.sh + dev-stack/dev-stack + demo-stack/up-injected.sh + stack-verify/lib+live; python generators: stack-core/gen_override.py + stack-injection/gen_injected_override.py). The rosetta m22/provision-lifecycle branch carries ONLY plan/doc records + the corpus/ops docs (directus-local.md lifecycle half + verification.md/idempotency.md/rosetta_demo.md rows + the collateral print-only retirements). ALL executable code is ext-repo-side (tag prop-room-m22, set by the orchestrator post-close).

coverage.note: M22 ran a 4-pass hardening sweep (no /developer-kit:harden-milestone separate ledger — recorded inline in progress.md § Hardening). The directly-coverable python generators: stack-core/gen_override.py 62% -> 85% (+23 — main() + the --with-directus summary now covered; residual is the docker subprocess resolved_config + pre-M22 build_override edges); stack-injection/gen_injected_override.py 99% (only the __main__ guard uncovered). The shell engines (dev-setdress, autoverify, readiness, up-injected) are not python-coverable — deepened behaviorally via subprocess harnesses (stubbed docker/CLIs recording argv). Stop condition: scan clean at Pass 4 (the six-dimension sweep found one thin arg-parse edge in Pass 4); coverage deltas stabilized; 0 flakes.
coverage.harden_bugs_note: 0 production bugs surfaced across the 4 hardening passes + the close review — the build-phase tests were sound; hardening deepened error/edge/main() coverage the build-minimum didn't reach. The close adversarial pass (7 scenarios) also found 0 new findings — all already test-pinned.

benchmarks.note: No performance-sensitive code in M22 (shell provisioning glue + override-emission generators). The one resource concern — a Directus container per stack — is handled by the 12 GB-VM preflight note (~1 GiB runtime, mem_limit 1g, max-2-co-resident), not a threshold test.

notes: M22 is the 2nd + lifecycle milestone of v1.5 'prop room' — it turns M21's print-only recipe into an EXECUTED, idempotent, prod-safe bring-up step that boots a per-stack Directus as a COMPOSE SERVICE (the v1.5 maintainability constraint: existing teardown/registry/verify cover it for free; the only executed steps are the one-shot bootstrap + the post-replay restart compose can't express). demo default-on / dev opt-in (--local-content); N=0 behind --force. The load-bearing finding for this milestone is the firewall-as-executed-gate: EnvContract.Validate moves from a print-time check to a hard-abort-before-any-write gate (the M17-for-TRUNCATE discipline, now for the executed provision), with a runtime no-prod-read backstop in autoverify. Non-fatal throughout: any provision failure degrades to the prod-read path with an honest status line. Close was clean: 8 findings (0 scope / 0 must-fix / 3 should-fix code comments landed ext e989982 / 2 docs — DOC-1 ops-README Fate-1 fixed, DOC-2 CLAUDE.md Fate-2 to M24 / 0 tests / 0 blend), 0 adversarial-new (7 scenarios all already test-pinned), the deferral audit GREEN (0 repeat / 0 aged / 0 M22-originated). Go unchanged at 795 (M22 touches no Go); Python 360 -> 418 collected (+58, +8 env-gated skip); flake 0 (5/5 sequential). Next: M23 (/developer-kit:build-milestone — content cutover + referential closure: re-point DIRECTUS_BASE_ADDR at the local instance + close the referential gap).
